event.name: Person Detected
event.description: A person was detected by Frigate on this camera.

event.name: Person Left
event.description: All persons have left the camera's field of view.

event.name: Car Detected
event.description: A car was detected by Frigate on this camera.

event.name: Car Left
event.description: All cars have left the camera's field of view.

event.name: Dog Detected
event.description: A dog was detected by Frigate on this camera.

event.name: Cat Detected
event.description: A cat was detected by Frigate on this camera.

event.name: Object Detected
event.description: Any object was detected (generic catch-all).

event.name: Object Left
event.description: An object type count dropped to zero.

event.name: Motion Detected
event.description: Motion was detected on this camera.

event.name: Motion Not Detected
event.description: Motion has stopped on this camera.

event.name: Zone Entered
event.description: An object entered a detection zone.

event.name: Zone Exited
event.description: All objects of a type left a detection zone.

event.name: Loitering Detected
event.description: An object has been loitering in a zone beyond the configured threshold.

event.name: Camera Online
event.description: Camera has come online / is reachable.

event.name: Camera Offline
event.description: Camera has gone offline / is unreachable.

event.name: Audio: Speech
event.description: Speech was detected by Frigate audio detection.

event.name: Audio: Bark
event.description: A dog bark was detected by Frigate audio detection.

event.name: Audio: Scream
event.description: A scream was detected by Frigate audio detection.

event.name: Audio: Yell
event.description: Yelling was detected by Frigate audio detection.

event.name: Audio: Fire Alarm
event.description: A fire alarm was detected by Frigate audio detection.

event.name: Audio: Glass Breaking
event.description: Glass breaking was detected by Frigate audio detection.

event.name: Audio: Siren
event.description: A siren was detected by Frigate audio detection.

event.name: Audio: Car Horn
event.description: A car horn was detected by Frigate audio detection.

event.name: Audio: Music
event.description: Music was detected by Frigate audio detection.

event.name: Audio Detected
event.description: Any audio event was detected (generic catch-all).

event.name: Detection Enabled
event.description: Object detection was enabled on this camera.

event.name: Detection Disabled
event.description: Object detection was disabled on this camera.

event.name: Recording Enabled
event.description: Recording was enabled on this camera.

event.name: Recording Disabled
event.description: Recording was disabled on this camera.
